tools.name: Obsidian
tools.description: Our entire knowledge base, daily operations, and this transparency site run on it. Bootstrapped, founder-led, free for personal use, local-first data ownership.

tools.name: Supabase
tools.description: Powers 8 projects across QWF. Open source, strong nonprofit support, active founder (Paul Copplestone).

tools.name: BetterStack
tools.description: Uptime monitoring and status page for all QWF services. Generous free tier, founder-led, loves nonprofits.

tools.name: n8n
tools.description: 50+ workflows automating everything from meeting prep to daily operations. Self-hostable, open source core, founder still active.

tools.name: Stripe
tools.description: Processes all QWF donations. Patrick Collison still CEO, rock-solid, universal.

tools.name: SuiteDash
tools.description: Our family portal (family.quietlyworking.org). Bootstrapped, founder active in community, lifetime deal roots, all-in-one.

tools.name: Cloudflare
tools.description: DNS and security for every QWF domain. Incredible free tier, public company but not PE.

tools.name: Claude / Anthropic
tools.description: Primary AI for all QWF operations. Safety-focused mission, Dario Amodei founder-led.

tools.name: Claude Code
tools.description: The agent that literally runs our backoffice. This page was synced by a script it helped build.

tools.name: Lovable
tools.description: Builds our web apps (HQ Command Center, Quietly Spotting, and more). Founder (Anton Osika) deeply involved, early stage, genuine heart — 20% NPO discount, Valentine's Day 50% off credits, and 24 hours of free usage for *everyone* on International Women's Day 2026.

tools.name: monday.com
tools.description: Visual project planning with Gantt baselines for supporter portfolio rollups. 10 free Pro seats for nonprofits with full features (Gantt baselines, formula columns, GraphQL API, webhooks). Adopted late April 2026 after years of mental dismissal — the proof that "revisit, don't dismiss" matters. Founders Roy Mann + Eran Zinman; public co since 2021 (Owner Involved score pending verification). One of the strongest nonprofit programs in our entire stack.

tools.name: Let's Encrypt
tools.description: Free SSL certificates for everything. Nonprofit (ISRG), free forever, changed the internet. Perfect Heart score.

tools.name: OpenRouter
tools.description: One API for all AI models. Founder-led, great developer experience.

tools.name: EmailDelivery.com
tools.description: Self-hosted email platform. Open source, MIT license. Our ESP runs for $35/year.

tools.name: Docker
tools.description: Containers for n8n, ESP, and local services. The technology is foundational even if Docker Inc. has had ownership drama.

tools.name: Vista Social
tools.description: Daily social media management. Needs research on company.

tools.name: RackNerd
tools.description: Budget VPS hosting. Our ESP runs on a $35/year VPS that actually works.

tools.name: Amazon SES
tools.description: Email sending at $0.10 per 1,000 emails. AWS is the opposite of founder-led, but unbeatable value.

tools.name: Twilio
tools.description: SMS and voice for all QWF communications. Twilio.org provides tools AND grant funds to nonprofits... we've never paid a penny. Their nonprofit program is EPIC.

tools.name: GitHub
tools.description: All our repos including this transparency site. Microsoft-owned, but the free tier is generous.

tools.name: VS Code
tools.description: Primary code editor. Microsoft-owned but fully open source, incredible community.

tools.name: PostgreSQL
tools.description: Community-governed, open source, no corporate owner. The gold standard.

tools.name: Caddy
tools.description: Open source, founder-led, automatic HTTPS. Elegant.

tools.name: WordPress
tools.description: Powers 11 QWF sites. Open source, nonprofit foundation (despite 2024-25 Automattic drama).

tools.name: DreamHost
tools.description: Employee-owned, 28+ years, strong nonprofit support. Hosts our L4G site.

tools.name: Apify
tools.description: Founder-led, strong community, good free tier.

tools.name: Redis
tools.description: Open source (with recent license changes), fast, universal.

tools.name: Divi
tools.description: Nick Roach still leads Elegant Themes. Bootstrapped.

tools.name: Discord
tools.description: Internal team communication. Free tier is incredible, community-first DNA.

tools.name: Circle
tools.description: Founder-led SaaS community platform.

tools.name: Atlassian (Loom)
tools.description: We use Loom for video. As of Feb 2026, Atlassian offers 100% off Jira, Confluence, Loom, and Teamwork Collection for social impact teams (25 seats or less). Previously 75% off. EPIC.

tools.name: Zoom
tools.description: All QWF meetings. 50% nonprofit discount via GoodStack (approved Feb 2026). Eric Yuan still CEO.

tools.name: Google Workspace
tools.description: Great product. Zero soul. We use it because everyone else does.

tools.name: Microsoft 365
tools.description: We use Graph API heavily for email automation

tools.name: Azure
tools.description: Our primary VMs run here (2 servers)

tools.name: Google Maps API
tools.description: Powers our local lead research

tools.name: Google Voice
tools.description: Free phone line for a small nonprofit

tools.name: SQLite
tools.description: The most deployed database on earth. Powers our local data stores.

tools.name: DeepSeek
tools.description: Fast and cheap for mechanical pattern matching

tools.name: Google Gemini
tools.description: Video content processing

tools.name: Whisper (OpenAI)
tools.description: Meeting transcription

tools.name: Apollo.io
tools.description: Lead research and enrichment

tools.name: AnyMail Finder
tools.description: Email discovery and verification

tools.name: DataForSEO
tools.description: SEO research and analysis

tools.name: Crunchbase
tools.description: Company research for QWS reviews

tools.name: Instantly
tools.description: Domain warmup and cold outreach

tools.name: DMARC Report
tools.description: Email authentication monitoring

tools.name: Reoon
tools.description: Bulk email validation

tools.name: Yelp
tools.description: Local business research

tools.name: YellowPages
tools.description: Local business directory
